steps.title: Identify the key observation
steps.content: Bushbabies forage MORE with increased lunar intensity because increased light benefits them more—specifically through their greater reliance on vision.

steps.title: Apply the cost-benefit logic
steps.content: C states that any disadvantages are more than compensated by advantages—which must be true for bushbabies to forage more with more light while making cost-benefit trade-offs. The other choices either assume unstated costs or claim OFT requires species to behave identically. That matches choice C — C is correct.
